Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Peculiar microstructural evolution and tensile properties of $ \beta $-containing $ \gamma $-TiAl alloys fabricated by electron beam melting

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-OES for metallic elements; inert gas fusion for oxygen

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition Ti-44Al-4Cr (at%). Al content decreases by 0.9 at% during EBM fabrication due to evaporation. Raw powder: Ti-44.8Al-4.0Cr-0.15O (at%). Balance element is Ti.

Process_Text.original: EBM using Arcam Q10 system at accelerating voltage 60 kV and preheating temperature 1333 K; layer thickness 90 um; beam current I=28 mA; scanning speed v=800 mm/s; energy density ED=4.0 J/mm2; building direction parallel to longitudinal direction of rods; no post-HIP treatment.
Process_Text.simplified: EBM Arcam Q10, 60 kV, 1333 K preheat, 90 um layer, ED=4.0 J/mm2, no HIP

Microstructure_Text.original: Uniform alpha2/beta/gamma mixed structure composed of two regions: (1) alpha2/gamma lamellar region with lamellar spacing 62.1 nm, and (2) beta/gamma dual phase region with ~50% beta volume fraction. Ultrafine lamellar grains and beta/gamma cell structure are absent in HED microstructure. Area 1 (top surface to ~220 um depth) shows finest microstructure; Area 2 directly below melt pool has coarser mixed structure; Area 3 shows mixed structure with high gamma fraction (f_gamma_MS=23%).
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Uniform HED microstructure: alpha2/beta/gamma mixed structure with alpha2/gamma lamellar region (62.1 nm spacing) and beta/gamma dual phase region (~50% beta)

Microstructure_Info.Main_Phase: Gamma (TiAl) matrix with alpha2 and beta phases

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R1 sample; exceeds cast 48-2-2 alloys (450-550 MPa) and comparable to cast TNM alloys (700-800 MPa)

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R1 sample; higher than cast 48-2-2 (~450 MPa) and TNM alloys (~600 MPa)

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R1 sample; limited plastic deformation due to brittle fracture mode

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R1 sample; high ductility due to ductile fracture mode (dimples observed)

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-OES for metallic elements; inert gas fusion for oxygen

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition Ti-44Al-4Cr (at%). Balance element is Ti.

Process_Text.original: EBM using Arcam Q10 system at accelerating voltage 60 kV and preheating temperature 1333 K; layer thickness 90 um; energy density ED=2.6 J/mm2; building direction parallel to longitudinal direction of rods; no post-HIP treatment.
Process_Text.simplified: EBM Arcam Q10, 60 kV, 1333 K preheat, 90 um layer, ED=2.6 J/mm2, no HIP

Microstructure_Text.original: Microstructure transition region between HED and LED. Volume fractions: V_alpha2/beta/gamma ~70%, V_ultrafine alpha2/gamma lamellar grain ~30%. The proportion of ultrafine lamellar grains increases compared to R1 (HED), but beta/gamma cell structure is still minimal.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Transitional microstructure between HED and LED; 70% mixed structure, 30% ultrafine lamellar grains

Microstructure_Info.Main_Phase: Gamma (TiAl) matrix with alpha2 and beta phases

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R2 sample; limited ductility similar to other samples at RT

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R2 sample; high ductility at HT similar to other samples

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-OES for metallic elements; inert gas fusion for oxygen

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition Ti-44Al-4Cr (at%). Balance element is Ti.

Process_Text.original: EBM using Arcam Q10 system at accelerating voltage 60 kV and preheating temperature 1333 K; layer thickness 90 um; energy density ED=1.4 J/mm2; building direction parallel to longitudinal direction of rods; no post-HIP treatment.
Process_Text.simplified: EBM Arcam Q10, 60 kV, 1333 K preheat, 90 um layer, ED=1.4 J/mm2, no HIP

Microstructure_Text.original: Layered LED microstructure perpendicular to building direction (layer width ~45 um each, total ~90 um matching powder layer thickness). Layer A: ultrafine alpha2/gamma lamellar grains (jagged grain boundaries) with beta/gamma cell structure (75% gamma in cell structure). Layer B: alpha2/beta/gamma mixed structure typical of HED. Ultrafine lamellar spacing: 32.5 nm (much finer than HED's 62.1 nm). Massive alpha transformation leads to high Cr content in lamellar grains.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Layered LED microstructure: alternating ultrafine alpha2/gamma lamellar grain layers (32.5 nm spacing) and alpha2/beta/gamma mixed structure layers; beta/gamma cell structure at lamellar grain boundaries

Microstructure_Info.Main_Phase: Gamma (TiAl) matrix with alpha2 and beta phases

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R5 sample; limited ductility at RT due to brittle fracture mode

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 type, gauge 5.0x1.5x0.5 mm, center of rod
Properties_Info.Note: R5 sample; high ductility at HT due to activation of multiple deformation modes and softening of gamma phase

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-OES for metallic elements; inert gas fusion for oxygen

Composition_Info.Note: Raw powder fabricated by Ar gas atomization from master ingots (Kobe Steel). Al content 0.8 at% higher than nominal to account for ~1 at% evaporation during EBM. 0.15 at% O from surface oxide layer. Balance element is Ti.

Process_Text.original: Ar gas atomization (Osaka Yakin Kogyo Co., Ltd.) from master ingots provided by Kobe Steel, Ltd. Japan.
Process_Text.simplified: Ar gas atomization from master ingots

Microstructure_Text.original: Spherical powder particles with circularity K=0.94. Single peak particle size distribution with narrow width. Mean diameter dm=70.2 um. High flowability (angle of repose ~44.8 deg) due to small amounts of fine particles (<10 um) and satellites.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Spherical Ar-atomized powder, K=0.94, dm=70.2 um, high flowability

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.particle_size_range: spherical with some satellites and fine particles (<10 um)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Measured by laser diffraction particle size distribution analyzer
Properties_Info.Note: Mean diameter of raw powder particles

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: K = 4*pi*A/P^2 where A=projected area, P=perimeter; measured using ImageJ (n>=200)
Angle of repose measured using revolution powder analyzer
Properties_Info.Note: Comparable to other EBM powders; high flowability due to minimal fine particles and satellites

Composition_Info.Note: Conventional gamma-TiAl alloy used in commercial LPT blades. Typical composition (at%).

Microstructure_Text.original: Cast Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb alloy microstructure. Grain size 100-800 um according to literature (Refs 43-45).

Properties_Info.Note: Reference benchmark for comparison; typical cast properties

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: High temperature (1023 K); from literature comparison
Properties_Info.Note: Reference benchmark for comparison at HT
Reference benchmark for comparison; cast alloy HT ductility

Composition_Info.Note: Beta-solidifying TiAl alloy developed by Clemens et al. (Ref 8). Composition not explicitly given in this paper.

Process_Text.original: Conventional casting with subsequent heat treatment for TNM alloys developed by Clemens et al.

Microstructure_Text.original: Beta-containing gamma-TiAl alloy with adjustable beta/B2 phase fraction. Cast microstructure.

Properties_Info.Note: Reference benchmark for comparison; comparable to EBM R1 sample at RT
